name: io.github.evilander/audrey
description: Local-first biological memory for coding agents: recall, consolidation, and pre-action Guard checks.

environmentVariables.name: AUDREY_DATA_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory for the SQLite memory store (defaults to ~/.audrey/data)

environmentVariables.name: AUDREY_AGENT
environmentVariables.description: Logical memory owner used for scoped operations (defaults to the host name)
